name: cpp-fluid-physics-sandbox
description: High-performance real-time particle and fluid physics simulation written in C++ and compiled to WebAssembly

scripts.compile: mkdir -p src/web/public/wasm && /opt/homebrew/bin/emcc src/cpp/fluid_solver.cpp src/cpp/simulation.cpp src/cpp/bindings.cpp -o src/web/public/wasm/fluid_sim.js -O3 -s WASM=1 -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_NAME='createFluidSimModule' -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS="['HEAPU8','HEAPF32','wasmMemory']" --bind

author: Saksham Gupta
